**🇷🇺****🛢**** US quietly extends Russian oil window after vowing to cut it off**

The US Treasury just issued a new license allowing continued transactions for Russian oil shipments — despite earlier promises to shut that door.

📑 The Treasury’s General License 134B** permits the sale and delivery of Russian-origin oil loaded by April 17**, extending the window through mid-May.

🗓 That comes days after Treasury Secretary Scott[ Bessent said the US would not renew the license](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/68269).

🤡 “No renewal” lasted about 48 hours — looks like soaring oil prices forced a rethink.

Demented Don rushed to declare the Strait of Hormuz “completely open and ready for business” — but reality looks very different.

⛔️ Iran has told mediators it will continue to limit ship traffic and impose tolls during the cease-fire period, according to The Wall Street Journal.

⛴ Vessels will need to coordinate with the IRGC, which can still block ships from countries Tehran considers hostile, the report said.

💸 Iranian officials also signaled plans for a future system that would allow Tehran to manage the strait and collect fees after a final deal with Washington.

The tell-tale omens have been stacking up – they are hard to miss.

full_text:
✡️👁 **Project 545: Israel's $145 million bid to own your next ChatGPT response**

👉 A poll commissioned by Israel's own Foreign Ministry found that 47% of Americans believe Israel is committing genocide. Facing this PR crisis, Israel poured $145 million into Project 545 — a direct investment in fighting those numbers.

🔴 The program, named after its 545 million shekel budget, uses AI and social platforms to push pro-Israel propaganda to American audiences. 

🔴 The Israeli government paid Clock Tower X, a key Project 545 contractor, over $6 million. The official goal in Justice Department filings is "combating antisemitism," but the real task is "delivering GPT framing results on GPT conversations".

🔴 Clock Tower X is run by Brad Parscale — Donald Trump's former digital campaign manager. His team is now reshaping the information battlefield around Israel: to do this, they built a network of 11 front news sites. These look like independent outlets, but all include a disclosure: "managed on behalf of the State of Israel". 

🔴 Each site generates hundreds of pro-Israel articles. ChatGPT scrapes this data and presents it as fact — so when you ask the AI about the war, the answer may be paid for by a Israeli government.

🔴 This method is called GEO — Generative Engine Optimization, a new version of SEO for AI. 

💬 "Just like SEO maps which websites shape search results, GEO maps which sources influence AI responses," explains Gadi Evron, CEO of Israeli cyber firm Nostick.

🔴 The contract requires mass content production for different platforms. At least 80% of the content is aimed at Gen Z via TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. The total reach target is 50 million impressions per month.

👍** **[**Boost us**](https://t.me/boost/geopolitics_prime)** | **[**Chat**](https://t.me/+tltgWD-GUqw0OTAy)** | ****@geopolitics_prime**

🔴 The Pentagon’s Defense Intelligence Agency reportedly believes China was seriously considering supplying Tehran with advanced radar systems. Before that, Russia was already accused of feeding intel to Iran.

🔴 These accusations look like a classic blame game: “We failed to regime-change Iran not because our plan was trash, but because China secretly stepped in.”

📌 Iran remains one of the last anti-Globalist strongholds in the Middle East. While none of these claims were officially confirmed, here’s what China could theoretically have provided to Iran:

🌏 MANPADS, as this was the reported device that shot down the F-15 jet

🌏 Dual use materials for manufacturing drones and missiles

🌏 Satellite navigation and surveillance to strike US military infrastructure

full_text:
🇮🇱👮‍♀️❌**Police meddling, threats & loyalty tests still not enough to fire Ben-Gvir**

Israel’s top court has stopped short of ordering PM Benjamin Netanyahu to fire his Zionist henchman over allegations of hijacking the independence of Israel’s law‑enforcement bodies.

Instead, a High Court injunction curbs National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir’s ability to appoint senior police officials to sensitive posts and bars him from public bluster over police force use or active investigations.

☠️ **Ben-Gvir is accused of:**

➡️  “illicitly” meddling in operational police decisions & investigations into security personnel 

➡️  shaping how police handle protests 

➡️  unlawfully blocking promotions (case of senior investigator Rinat Saban who testified against Netanyahu in his corruption trial)

➡️  threatening officers & conditioning careers on “loyalty”

➡️ seeking to impose a “policy” of not securing humanitarian aid convoys despite cabinet decisions 

In one 2024 investigation case, Ben-Gvir publicly attacked the military advocate general and urged her to “take her hands off” reservists suspected of abusing a Palestinian detainee.

Ben-Gvir has been a rabid driving force behind Israel’s campaign of genocide in Gaza, [celebrating with ](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/67518)champagne the passage of a law allowing Israel to execute Palestinian prisoners, bragging about [execution chambers](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/67632), and [ordering police](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/63132) to shoot Palestinians.

👍** **[**Boost us**](https://t.me/boost/geopolitics_prime)** | **[**Chat**](https://t.me/+tltgWD-GUqw0OTAy)** | ****@geopolitics_prime**
headline: 🇮🇱👮‍♀️❌**Police meddling, threats & loyalty tests still not enough to fire Ben-Gvir**

🗣🇮🇷🙅 **Ex-Pentagon adviser warns Washington wants to destroy Iran — and may fail badly**
 
💬 “What's next is a massive air and missile campaign that begins sometime on Monday that is designed to destroy the Iranian state and cause the disintegration of Iranian society,” Retired Colonel Douglas McGregor has said. 

The US wants to destroy Iran entirely, but full-scale war and bombardment will not work. Iran has made clear that if attacked, it will destroy oil infrastructure, he added.

full_text:
💀📲✡️ **Your iPhone is sponsored by the IDF: Apple's billion-dollar bet on Israeli surveillance**

In January 2026, Apple paid nearly $2 billion for Israeli startup Q ai — its second-largest acquisition ever. The technology it bought can read whispers, emotions, heart rate, and even unspoken words through barely noticeable facial movements.

🇮🇱 **Apple's deep ties to Israel
**
Apple's second-largest R&D center is in Herzliya, Israel, where hundreds of engineers develop key technologies for iPhone, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. The company has acquired six Israeli firms: Anobit ($390M), PrimeSense ($360M, the basis for FaceID), LinX ($20M, iPhone cameras), Realface, Camerai, and Q ai (nearly $2B).

🪖 **Military origins
**
Each was founded by veterans of IDF Unit 8200, Unit 81, or the Israeli Air Force — units that coordinate mass surveillance and airstrikes on Gaza. The founders of Q ai — Aviad Maizels, Yonatan Wexler, and Avi Barliya — served in those exact same cyberwarfare units.

30% of Q ai's employees were called up to participate in the Gaza military campaign. By closing the deal, Apple brought dozens of soldiers linked to combat operations into its global workforce.

🤔 **Silent speech technology
**
Q ai's technology reads micro-movements of facial skin, detecting whispered speech, emotions, pulse, and respiration — without a single word spoken. The company has filed a patent for a system that identifies words through lip movements and skin micro-vibrations, working even in complete silence.

Apple plans to integrate this into headphones and glasses for hands-free Siri control — but the same algorithms allow militaries to interrogate more effectively. It is a classic dual-use tool.

🙅  **Ignored condemnation
**
Human rights group Skyline International condemned Apple's purchase, calling it "rewarding technology born of the Gaza genocide." The group urged BlackRock and Vanguard to freeze the deal pending an independent audit, but the call was ignored.

👁 **Beyond the deal

**Apple made headlines last week when Apple Maps stopped displaying village names in southern Lebanon — the same region Israel is currently invading as part of the broader US-Israeli conflict against Iran.

The US provides Israel with $3.8 billion in annual military aid — over $300 billion total since 1946, indirectly supporting its tech sector. Until recently, Apple's offices sat next to NSO Group, the creators of Pegasus spyware, though NSO moved to another part of Tel Aviv in 2024.

👍** **[**Boost us**](https://t.me/boost/geopolitics_prime)** | **[**Chat**](https://t.me/+tltgWD-GUqw0OTAy)** | ****@geopolitics_prime**
headline: 💀📲✡️ **Your iPhone is sponsored by the IDF: Apple's billion-dollar bet on Israeli surveillance**
